name: generate_document
description:
Generate a professional Office document (DOCX, XLSX, or PPTX) at the specified path within a registered source directory.

Use this tool when the user asks to create a Word document, Excel spreadsheet, or PowerPoint presentation.

Content format varies by document type:
- DOCX: { "title": "...", "sections": [{ "heading": "...", "body": "...", "bullet_items": ["item1", ...] }] }
  Body text lines starting with "- " or "• " are auto-formatted as bullet points.
  Optional bullet_items array adds explicit bullet list after the body text.
- XLSX: { "sheets": [{ "name": "...", "headers": [...], "rows": [[...], ...], "column_widths": [12.0, ...] }] }
  Headers get bold white-on-blue styling with frozen pane. Data rows alternate white/gray. Numbers auto-formatted.
  Optional column_widths array overrides auto-estimated widths per column.
- PPTX: { "slides": [{ "title": "...", "body": "...", "bullet_items": ["item1", ...], "layout": "title|content" }] }
  layout "title" = full-screen dark blue title slide (default for first slide when multiple slides).
  layout "content" = dark blue header bar + white content area (default).
  Body text lines starting with "- " or "• " are auto-formatted as bullet points.
  Optional bullet_items array adds explicit bullet points after body text.

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must be within a registered source directory.

content.description: Structured content for the document. Schema depends on the format chosen.
